title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi tries to convince Tanvi that Pawan is with his ex girlfriend in a room. But to his dismay, they find him alone. Later, he and his brother go back to search for her but in vain. Will Rishi be able to convince Tanvi against Pawan?

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi, Tanu, Pawan and Neha go shopping, where Rishi tries his best to get close to Tanu. Will Tanu express her feelings for Rishi?

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi pays the bill for Tanu's dress at the shop and Pawan gets offended because of it. Elsewhere, Manpreet accidentally bumps into Aahana and breaks the family photo. Rishi tries to gatecrash Pawan and Tanu's dinner date. Will he succeed?

title: Balika Vadhu - Kacchi Umar Ke Pakke Rishte
subTitle: Anandi, a child bride, married into an affluent family at a tender age, struggles to cope with the traditions. Soon, she overcomes multiple personal obstacles to emerge as an example for rural women.

title: Noyontara
subTitle: Tara envisions a massive spider while praying for the proprietor of Pari Mahal. Later, a girl appears at Pari Mahal holding a locket that has a picture of Shaoli and Surjo to confirm her identity.

title: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di

title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki
subTitle: Mannat, a gifted young chef, dreams big but faces a formidable obstacle, her ruthless employer Aishwarya. Unknown to both, Aishwarya is also Mannat's birth mother who abandoned her when she was born.

subTitle: Bound by marriage, former AIPMT topper Aarambhi clings to a hidden dream, waiting for the spark to ignite her second act.

subTitle: Kusum feels guilty regarding Adit while Ishana protects Mangal from Gayatri. Eventually, Lakshmi expresses appreciation to the mess supervisor and masks herself as Lavanya to take revenge on Jiya.

subTitle: The emotional ups and downs and struggles in Lakshmi's life that transform her from a weak woman to a fearless warrior who tackles her problems head on.

title: Mahadev & Sons
subTitle: Dheeraj rescues Rajji from Kalyan's kidnapping attempt. Subsequently, Vidya contacts Bhanu to reassure her that Rajji is secure and will remain with her overnight.

title: Seher Hone Ko Hai
subTitle: Amaal demands that Fareed drive her and Kausar to Aadhum Gunj to see Seher. Later, Seher and Mahid build a campfire in the woods for their safety.
